case_title: EFI LOGISTICS INC. VS. SITOA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: CERT. MAIL SIGNED, NO SERVICE DATE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY EFI LOGISTICS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SITOA CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EFI LOGISTICS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SITOA CORPORATION $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $245.23 INTEREST, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,305.23, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SITOA CORPORATION
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF EFI LOGISTICS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SITOA CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EFI LOGISTICS INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
